code: import{useState,useEffect}from"react";import"./Tasks.css";import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Tasks(){const[tasks,setTasks]=useState([]);const[newTask,setNewTask]=useState("");const[editingId,setEditingId]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{const saved=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("tasks"))||[];setTasks(saved);},[]);useEffect(()=>{localStorage.setItem("tasks",JSON.stringify(tasks));},[tasks]);const addTask=status=>{if(!newTask.trim())return;const task={id:Date.now(),title:newTask,status};setTasks([...tasks,task]);setNewTask("");};const updateStatus=(id,newStatus)=>{setTasks(tasks.map(t=>t.id===id?{...t,status:newStatus}:t));};const updateTitle=(id,value)=>{setTasks(tasks.map(t=>t.id===id?{...t,title:value}:t));};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"kanban-container",children:["todo","progress","done"].map(status=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"kanban-column",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:[status==="todo"&&"⚪ Not Started",status==="progress"&&"🔵 In Progress",status==="done"&&"🟢 Done"]}),tasks.filter(t=>(t.status||"todo")===status).map(t=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"task-card",children:[editingId===t.id?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{value:t.title,onChange:e=>updateTitle(t.id,e.target.value),onBlur:()=>setEditingId(null),autoFocus:true}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{onClick:e=>{e.stopPropagation();setEditingId(t.id);},children:t.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"actions",children:[status!=="todo"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{onClick:e=>{e.stopPropagation();updateStatus(t.id,"todo");},children:"\u2190"}),status!=="done"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{onClick:e=>{e.stopPropagation();updateStatus(t.id,"done");},children:"\u2192"})]})]},t.id)),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"+ Add a task",value:newTask,onChange:e=>setNewTask(e.target.value),onKeyDown:e=>e.key==="Enter"&&addTask(status)})]},status))});}
